# dnacenter_event_webhook_crete (Data Source)

It performs create operation on Event Management.

- Create Webhook Destination

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dnacevent_webhook_create" "example" {
  provider    = dnac
  description = "string"
  headers {

    default_value = "string"
    encrypt       = "false"
    name          = "string"
    value         = "string"
  }
  item {

    # api_status = ------
    error_message {

      # errors = [------]
    }
    # status_message = ------
  }
  method     = "string"
  name       = "string"
  trust_cert = "false"
  url        = "string"
  webhook_id = "string"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- **description** (String) Description
- **headers** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--headers))
- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
- **method** (String) Method
- **name** (String) Name
- **trust_cert** (String) Trust Cert
- **url** (String) Url
- **webhook_id** (String) Required only for update webhook configuration
